reviews.title: Not a good experience
reviews.text:
I would rate my experience as 3 out of 5, and below are the reasons for my dissatisfaction:

1. The air conditioning in our room (1907) was not working properly, making our stay uncomfortable.
2. The WiFi connection was very poor, forcing me to use my roaming data to access the internet.
3. I ordered food from the Makan Kitchen and waited for over 40 minutes. Despite following up with three different waitresses, I received the same response each time - that the food was still being prepared. Frustrated, I left the restaurant and had to purchase food from a nearby mart. I must acknowledge the kind gesture of the staff member who followed up with us and offered complimentary food.
4. I booked a king guest room for two adults and one child via Agoda. However, upon arrival, the receptionist at the Makan Restaurant insisted that only two adults were entitled to complimentary breakfast per room
5. I informed the hotel via email that we were celebrating my son's birthday on April 6th and our anniversary on the 7th. Despite this, I had to make multiple phone calls to ensure at least a simple decoration for my son's birthday.
6. Coleen and Farah contacted me regarding my feedback, attempting to dismiss it without first understanding the details and verifying with the third-party app whether my concern was valid. Very insensible people. A waste of time speaking to them

reviews.title: BED BUGS AND TERRIBLE SERVICE
reviews.text:
The Doubletree by Hilton was a truly terrible place to stay. Our room had bed bugs. It was awful. One night we came back and both of our keys didn't unlock the room door, we called to the lobby down stairs from the phone on our floor and were told to come down to the lobby. I asked if someone could come up as we had a lot of shopping bags. We waited 25 mins and no one came, so I went down to the lobby and the staff were extremely rude and unapologetic.
The only nice thing about this hotel is the buffet and the chef Carlos.

reviews.title: Hotel was good but service could improve.

reviews.title: Disappointment!
reviews.text: Choose this hotel for anniversary celebration turn out to be what a turn off. We stay here because we choose to staycay and have buffet dinner which is convenient for us but from the hotel itself and the dinner really not worth the money spent. The dinner me and my bf trying to eat most of the cuisine but we only had one bite and food doesn't taste good, cold western choice and nothing to eat basically. Came in only for 30min then left to find other delivery food. Check out, we were asking for smoking room but they mentioned don't have any so we stayed and we understand we signed the policy of non smoking, we choose to vape instead since the smoking area is too far. Didn't have any signage saying no vaping since malaysia vape is legal, but upon checkout manager and staff the room smell smoke and cannot sell the room which is we did not, no proof or anything or signage for no vape allowed still asking to pay the penalty charges. Such a bad experience will never return again even for any of the food choice or the room.!!

reviews.title: My credit card suspect compromised in this hotel
reviews.text: On 21 Dec and check out by 22Dec, My credit card was presented during checkin, it was charged twice by two unknown companies. I only use my credit card once upon Check in in this two day. Warning to other guest checking in Hilton doublebay, watch out your bill

reviews.title: worst experience

Then, my kid ate the chipsmore and nuts, we already paid during check out, but then they email to us that they want to charge what we ate in the room in my credit card! even worse, when i emailed them the receipt proof of the purchase, they DID NOT APOLOGIZE to us for accusing us not paying for the food, and said the person in charge was not around (what a lousy excuse!). I am deeply hurt and disappointed with this supposedly 5 star hotel. I'll not staying/eat at this hotel ever again.

reviews.title: not worth the $
reviews.text: No free wifi, no free parking. All must pay. Isn't that part of the service of booking such an expensive hotel? Parking is 10RM per day, has to be validated when you exit the hotel. So we have to go up and down, in and out just for that 10RM. Shouldn't the hotel absorb such little costs for such a hassle? Sofa isn't clean in the rooms, leftover crumbs all over the floor and sofa. So grand on the outside but badly done on the inside. Breakfast has a wide variety, but food is not worth the $ spent. Service by the staff at the restaurant made it worst. So many of them walking around blindly doing subpar work. Tried to order a latte with our table of 5, "Hi, can we have 1 latte and......" & she ran off, we haven't even finished our order. Isn't it obvious there's 5 of us? Ridiculous! Terrible! NEVER back again.

reviews.title: Nightmare experience with lack of basic necessities & renovating pool
reviews.text:
The pool was the highlight for us and we had no idea it was under renovation from Agoda. Our disappointment was as big as the hole in the ground that greeted us. 

But it’s ok we let it slide since they were apologetic and wasn’t their fault. 

But no it gets worse. 


Room given was pretty dated. But again, it’s ok - so long as it’s clean right? 

It gets even worse. 

To female travellers, be sure to remember your period supplies because there are no pads available in this entire 4 star hotel.  Cue 3am and I had my period. Called staff , asked for a sanitary pad and got a sanitary BAG because surprise surprise - no pads at all. 

Ok never mind. I’ll call for a GrabMart. When Grab driver arrived, he was told they’re not allowed to deliver to the counter and I had to physically come down myself to collect. 

Very disappointing stay - so what’s the difference between this hotel and an Airbnb? At least an Airbnb would have more accessible location with 24h marts instead. I know where I’d be booking the next time.

reviews.title: Worst hotel experience in my life
reviews.text:
Something was very wrong with the aircon.  Default setting at 17deg c when check-in. I set to 25deg c at 12mid night and went to bed but it got colder with cold air blown on my face from the aircon. At 1.45am I called the front desk and they sent an aircon engineer who opened the aircon vent and tightened some screws. Adjusted the temperature to 30deg c and the engineer left at 2am. But the aircon continued to blow cold air till about 4am when the temp normalised. Slept only 2 hours due to the aircon problem.
The room is very old. The noisy opening of the hotel room door is due to old door hinges, poorly maintained. It was deafening and annoying when I open it in the dead of the night.
The water from the shower is lukewarm but not hot enough. Same issue in the other room occupied by my family members. My sense is that the hotel maintenance is far below standard.
My first stay in a Hilton hotel. Deeply disappointed. Indeed my worst hotel stay in my life.

reviews.title: Not Worth It

However there is always exception to the rule. Karen from Reception was very friendly and helpful. She has a cheerful disposition and always have a ready smile. If I can find a reason for checking into the hotel again in the future it has to be that Karen is still working there. Thank you Karen!

reviews.title: Rude staff, bed had a mouldy smell
reviews.text:
Staff was rude and left us at the lobby to find our way up to the executive lounge ourselves. It was our first time there so we waited for a while till a bellboy walked pass before we could get his help to tap his card in the lift for us to go up.

When we were preparing to sleep and lifted up the blankets, the bedsheet had a strong mouldy smell. Requested for a change of blankets but it had the same smell and we had to sleep with it. Paying so much for a bed that made me wake up with a headache - I won’t recommend it. 

Nicely told the staff when we woke up, that the bed was smelly and made me wake up with a headache. She replied with a nod, and said that she will let the cleaners know. No apologies as well. 

Not coming back, my anniversary trip with my husband was ruined.

Our room by 10:00pm air conditioning was at 24 degrees.We went down and made noise after that in 30 minutes temperature cane to 19 degrees.I strongly recommend not to stay there .only good thing that hotel was beautiful and bathrooms were modern and nice looking but staff was untrained,food was lousy.We had our worst hotel experience with this hotel.

reviews.title: Disappointed to Double Tree by Hilton Hotel
reviews.text:
When we arrived the hotel and check-in, front desk was amaze me due to the staff pass us the cookie and it is hot from oven, we are so surprise that the staff just pick it up from the front desk, but normally cookie is come with coffee or tea, maybe my expectation is too high, it wasn't come with coffee or tea, I still remember when I check in G Hotel, there is a coffee machine next to it, and also served cool fruit punch when arrival. So how do you expect your guest eat cookie without drink ? doesn't make sense right.
So I told my wife, don't worry, we bring up to the room first, there should be a coffee machine in the room (b'cos G-Hotel has), it is another disappointment to us again, there is no coffee machine and the mini fridge is empty, some more the front desk was collected RM150 deposit, what is the purpose of having a fridge without anything inside ? so funny, must well you remove the fridge ? Finally we drink Nescafe and don't know what "Raintree" English breakfast tea bag at 25 teabag -RM9.00, can you imagine a 4 stars hotel give so cheap brand tea bag ? 
Another funny thing in this hotel is the parking charges is not free, it is RM10 each day. This is my first time encounter parking fees for a hotel stay.
I meet the Operating Director of this hotel, I was so happy thought can feedback to him, but when I told him all incident and my feeling, he said this is the hotel policy, I always believe one thing, Rules is dead, human is alive, rules was set by human and can be change to serve your guest better and improve the quality of the hotel. He told me if you upgrade to suite room, you will have all these free and late check out, sorry to say, not everyone will stay in your suite room, must well you remove all standard rooms.

reviews.title: very bad service and attitude from your staff
reviews.text:
Although it was 3 am in the middle of the night, right after I got off the grab I was confronted by security on why i was there.
when to counter to enquire on my booking made and although it was my mistake for not checking the check in time, your staff was totally unprofessional with attending to me, brushing me off saying "oh not within my control you have to find some other place before you get to check in at 3 pm"
I'm fine to forego my hotel stay fee and find a place to spend the night, but your staff keeps brushing me off like I'm not a paying guest and insists that I just find another place for tonight.
I understand that she might be young and inexperienced and all decked out in carrier accessories thus the job might not be of significant importance to her.
I stated you can keep my room for other guests and I do not require a refund just assist me in finding another place for tonight since I'm not local and familiar with JB.
The response was "I'm so sorry sir you just have to search online and find yourself".
How do you think i manage to book my stay at Hilton? if i was able to find an available room would i even bother asking for assistance?
Please re-evaluate your standards for the front desk, these are the people with whom your clients will be in contact and interact from the very start of their experience at your hotel and also when they leave.
I am not trying to educate you on how you should manage your staff but just my honest feedback.

reviews.title: Not worth it
reviews.text:
As one of the few 5 star hotel in JB, Hilton does not live up to their brand expectation. 
Service was bad (I was served by the duty manager), my booking was missing, follow-up is horrible, restaurant and bar service is filled with hiccups as well due to bad communication. Only the room was good that's it. If I just want good rooms and bad service, any other new 4/5 star hotel in JB would do just fine.

Grab is relatively easy to get around JB now a days, and not super pricey. It is alright to book other hotels that has better surroundings, albeit further away from city centre, it is still easy to access with grab.

reviews.title: Very disappointed experience
reviews.text: Plan to celebrate my birthday on last Friday and turn up to be an angry day for me. Am very upset with the service that really piss me off on my day. Was told that we have no free wifi as we book through agoda and it is only free for Hilton member. Recall that we do enjoy free wifi few months back hence we wanted to know why not this time round. The staff cant explain it and just tell me about the executive lounge access which puzzle me as we are not entitled and not related to what i have asked her. After asking her again she get help from her senior to explain to us and took back the executive lounge entitlement. Was rather confuse and i think in the 1st place you should honor your customer what you have offered and not to take it back especially in such a situation. Was very disappointed with this service in a 5 star hotel like hilton. A basic happy birthday wishes can also be miss. I went staycation every year and this is the only hotel that will miss such a basic wishes.

reviews.title: Sharing my bad experience in Level 13 restaurant
reviews.text:
Overall, we enjoyed our stay. The room and hotel service were very good. However, our experience at the Level 13 Italian restaurant was not good and affected our stay.

During dinner, we asked the waiter about the steak portion and wine recommendation. As first-time guests, this is normal for us. The waiter checked a few times and then brought the manager.

When we asked for wine advice, the manager asked about our budget and grade in a way that felt uncomfortable. His tone and facial expression made us feel not welcome.

We already saw the prices on the menu. We were only asking for a simple recommendation. We expected a more friendly and professional response.

This experience was very different from the rest of the hotel service. Because of this, we will need to think carefully before choosing your hotel again.

We hope you will look into this and improve the service.



Thanks 

Thiri

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Room has a foul musky sewage smell. They changed rooms for us but it was not worth the money we paid. The carpets throughout the rooms are dirty and has stains all over. Will not stay here again.
reviews.room_type: King One Bedroom Suite with Bath Tub

reviews.title: So so for a 4-star hotel
reviews.text:
We were disappointed with the following:
1. Came to try to check-in earlier around 1PM+ but staff said 1 of the 2 rooms we booked were not available but he reassured that he has already helped us check in & to await for WhatsApp message updates. We waited until 3:45PM & there were no updates, but we saw other people were getting their keys. When we tried to check in again, seemed like we weren't even checked in in the first place. Luckily we checked instead of waiting.
2. Paid RM218++/pax for the Christmas buffet. Saw there were some popular items like crayfish. However, after it was topped up for 3-4 times, the dish was replaced completely by sausages instead. It is fairly unfair for the hotel to do this, especially since charging such a high amount per pax.

Please kindly re-look into your service & restaurant standards.

reviews.title: Disappointed
reviews.text:
My stay was very disappointed due to the room condition. 

It was supposed to be a pleasant stay after a long day. After checking in, the toilet  ceiling was leaking. 

I requested to change the room. After a the staff send a technician, it was then they decided to change my room. 

After changing of room, the room A/C was not working well, the fridge was faulty leading to a bad experience. 

As it was late, I decided to just sleep it off. 

Very much disappointed

reviews.title: Not value for money
reviews.text: Room is small, no drinks in the fridge, unable to rent floaty at swimming since the person in charge is not there. My room is located at the balcony so i cant see clearly the outside view. Breakfast is ok. The only thing that i like is the baby cot comes with baby pillow n blanket.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Not very impressed with the service when we were served by the receptionist, not very friendly and he didn't give us the welcome cookies which most guests got. The room we booked smelled of cigarette smoke and we found stains on the bedsheets :(  location quite ok but will not recommend for the service we received.
reviews.room_type: 2 Bedroom Deluxe Family Suite W/Lounge Access

reviews.title: Not good value
reviews.text: Was given a room next to the lift lobby, can hear the lifts rushing up and down. The toilet had water noises from time to time. The humming of the aircon system was loud. The location is on the fringe of the city centre. Breakfast variety was wide, but the taste is below par. Definitely not worth the room price!

reviews.title: Receptionist are helpful
reviews.text: Asked for a slice of cake. Upon checking in the staff told me that there’s a simple deco has been arrange in the hotel room as requested, but turned out none. But the staff call me later to rearrange and gave some apologise token too. Thank you. Overall my family have a pleasant stay at the hotel

reviews.title: Quiet room is only upon request
reviews.text: Stayed in a room next to a lift that the loud sound woke me up in early morning 6+am and cant take a nap during day time also. Asking reception about the loud sound, only they informed that the sound was from lift. Checking with customer care line, they said we should request to have a quiet room during check-in. Then I only realized to have a quiet room is not basic here, but is only upon request!!! The hotel should ask the customer when they check-in if they are Ok with a room only has 6 hours quiet time in a day? the loud sound happened every 5 seconds from 6am-12am!! The hotel should be responsible for not assign such a room for a guest who only required good rest during hotel stay.

reviews.title: Hotel hygiene  during pandemic
reviews.text: Pillow very smelly even change for 2 times. Take very seriously on this matter. Housekeeping very bad.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
Cons: smoking rooms have no proper ventilation. Stinks of smoke everywhere without air freshener. If you offer smoking rooms you should cater for better ventilation and cleaning. Bathroom sink was stuck even after cleaning. Needed to remind the hotel 3 times before room was finally cleaned in late afternoon.

Pros: not much considering the price charged as hotel is not in the best location. No great views.  No restaurants nearby

reviews.title: Nothing to scream about
reviews.text: Not much around outside the hotel.

reviews.title: Breach of security, leaky baths, poor staff response
reviews.text: Visited the hotel on Saturday. Within 30 mins of ‘chilling’ in the room, 2 strangers had managed to enter our room as the check in counter had checked them into the same room. Cannot imagine not being there with all our valuables lying around; could’ve all been stolen. Called the front counter for help and had no prompt response and after half an hour or more we decided that there wasn’t going to be a response and so proceeded to the front counters ourselves to check what happened. Front counter staff gave unsatisfactory answer to our worries and tried to ‘silence’ us by providing a complimentary rollaway bed which was clearly the last thing on my mind now since the room was clearly unsafe. (How easy it was for someone to have just walked into my room?) Not sure why there wasn’t a manager around to help with the situation. The shower was leaking so much the entire floor was wet by the time you stepped out. Called the care line for extra towels and the response time was enough for the water to evaporate on its own. Completely ridiculous stay for a supposed highly rated hotel.

reviews.title: Too expensive for the service and room
reviews.text:
We booked the room with king size bed. Upon checking-in we were given queensize ... So we showed the Agoda voucher, and after checking with the manager, we did get the Kingsize. This room was next to the elevators and utilities room, thus extremely noisy. We requested a better room, and after two hours of playing with us (first no room was available, then only the queen size bed but without compensation for the downgrading of the room), then finally we got the room with a king size bed. 
So silly, and unnecessary.

reviews.title: Room Condition
reviews.text: Poor welcome treatment by reception staff when they discover booking was made through 3rd party agent like agoda...couldnt change room since booking was not made direct through HHonors...room that was given had a bad cigarette odours....

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Cut myself with their metal bottle. Staff didn even bother when I feedback to them.
reviews.negatives: Cut myself with their metal bottle. Staff didn even bother when I feedback to them.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Service was terrible

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Swimming pool area and in room dining foods
reviews.negatives: I always come back to this hotel, but this time I experienced a bit of discomfort with the room. It has a uncomfortable smell that I got my asthma.

reviews.title: Dissappointed
reviews.text: Im not so pleased. We checked in almost at 3pm. Only to know and informed that during check-in that check out time is at 11. First time i've heard that. upon my request at 12 noon, staff was reluctant and no effort to make guests feel welcome or pleasant staying. During check-out surprised by guests checking in at 12noon. Knowing its a Hilton group and known as one of a perstigious hotel, overall service and facilities rendered is poor.

reviews.title: A Mothers' Day short trip. No Celebrations visible. Sad
reviews.positives: Dinner - We were approached to taste the Mac & Cheese. The trolley with the melting of cheese and Trolley of Teh Tarik is something different . Keep it up! The Durian cake and the durian goreng is unique and nice. Thumbs up.
reviews.negatives:
Dinner - The satay was left cold so does the slices of roast meat. The clearance of plates and glasses need to be improve a lot. We have to call the staff to clear the table. The mata kucing is not fresh seem like being there for quite sometimes. (i am a mata kucing fruit lover). The Lobsters was served cold too.
Breakfast - The Nasi lemak's sambal and the sambal kupang was a dissapointment. Salty and sweet. No taste of spicyness at all "tak pedas". That kills my appetite. The Burasak was not well cooked.

The Toilet roll metallic cover kept falling down every time we use the toilet. Please do something @ room 1723

reviews.title: Staycation at Doubletree
reviews.text: My stay at the hotel was okay. The bath towels were big but there were no face towels provided. Combs, toothbrush, shaver were not provided. You have to call the "care-line" to ask for it. Maybe the hotel was budget conscious. Or maybe the hotel is aiming to get the "Best Green" award hotel. The most upset is the checkout time! It is at 11am. Any request for late checkout, you will have to pay. The check in time was @ 2pm. When I arrived at 3.15pm, my room was still not ready.

reviews.title: Dissatisfaction
reviews.text: Disappointed.  We booked 6 rooms thru Agoda but when we checked in they couldn't give us rooms near each other. We reserved to celebrate our dad's 73rd bday at their buffet and we were given promises that they did not keep. When my sister misplaced her parking ticket, she was told to pay RM$50 although as guests, car park was complimentary.  Also getting there was not easy as there is always a jam leading up to e hotel. Will never recommend dus hotel to frenz.

reviews.title: Poor
reviews.text: There are only few restaurants that we can choose, when we arrived there , the buffet was almost finished and it still charged us the original price, we ate only selected food and paid for RM 300 plus which we were not happy with that! And the shower area was too small which we didn't feel comfortable! We tried to call reception at midnight for servicing but there was no one answered.

reviews.title: room not clean properly
reviews.text: there are rubbish left over from previous  guest not removed from the bin and there are hairs on top of the bed linen .....not something expected from Hilton ....

reviews.title: Holiday
reviews.text: Area still under construction,, valet parking security asking for rm49, quite hight compared to others, otw back to sg from KL, even kl valet rm30

reviews.title: Overpriced for an old hotel
reviews.text: Felt that my stay was just okay. The facilities on the hotel room itself are faulty. The master light (backlight on the bedframe) doesn’t work even after asking the room service to repair the spoilt lights. Bathroom sink seems to be clogged and not cleaned thoroughly cos water doesn’t flow through quickly. Disappointing.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text:
Have wide spread of buffet breakfast but the foods are not nice.

Staff are quite rigid to change the room type unless you pay an amount. There is also deposit required which quite unnecessary.
reviews.room_type: Twin Accessible Rm W/Roll In Shower

reviews.title: Gaz and Augusta break!
reviews.text: We had a brilliant time..again...breakfast and executive lounge were both great and the staff..very professional! Thanks again
reviews.room_type: King Executive Room W/ Lounge Access

reviews.title: Good food
reviews.text: I enjoyed the good food here, but room was a bit squeezy if you're with kids.

reviews.title: Family trip
reviews.text: We have turned towels in dirty condition given to us on the first night. And they also ran out of their signature cookies.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Rooms doors have gaps to hallway, light from hallway visible in room, can hear people in hallway, smoke in hallway could enter room. AC thermostat not working but fixed it later at night.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text:
The best in cleanliness of hotel in JB. Breakfast spread was also the best 👍
Keep up and maintain professional.

reviews.title: Executive Lounge
reviews.text: Booked a King Executive Suite with Executive Lounge Access. This is for leisure trip. We were not allowed to dine in the Executive Lounge with our casual holidays attire in a t-shirt and shorts. We were only allowed to select the food and drinks and consumed inside our room.  We do not have this issue in other hotels.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Aircon spoil n room is clustered

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: The pool is extremely dirty shows no maintenance at all. Disappointed.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text:
+ Loved the makan kitchen buffet dinner and the staff took the trouble to decorate our table and sang a birthday song for my husband, really appreciate the effort in making his birthday a wonderful and memorable one.

- However, the hotel room given to us had a dated interior. It also had a musky smell. The hotel towel also had a wierd unpleasant smell. Moreover, the bedding was a little dusty.

In addition to that,  the hotel staff wanted to charge us for the buffet dinner again during check out, despite us paying for it the night before. They had to go through the receipts one by one to ascertain if we did, as a five star hotel, they should have a ‘five star’ system to keep track of the payments made by the hotel guests- this incident actually caused us unnecessary panic and distress, because we misplaced our copy of the receipt and we thought we had to pay again since there were no prove of payment made.

Double Tree Hilton was a much hospitable and pleasant hotel  pre-covid era. Now I feel that the hotel’s standard has dropped drastically.

reviews.title: Below expectation
reviews.text: The staff are tops in service standard.  The breakfast buffet was good in variety but lacked quality.   Stayed over on Sat and Sun.  Was so disappointed that it was lungs rendang instead of beef rendang and for both days somemore!  Not saying that the bedsheets were dirty but they did not feel fresh as expected of Hilton.  So it was below expectations for me.

reviews.title: Poor cleanliness
reviews.text: When i checked in, the room has Used water bottles left and the bathroom had used shower gels left. Bed was not well made and had stain marks on the bedsheets. Not really a pleasant experience and cleanliness for a five star hotel. Though i checked in late in the evening, i was expecting the room to be ready. But as soon as i informed they changed my room, but nothing was done to delight me as a customer.

reviews.title: hotel room in need of maintenance
reviews.text: bathroom door cannot latch at all. basin tap loose with water flowing out from the side. floor tile just outside bathroom loose and shaky. bad maintenance.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: The customer service via telephone was very very rude. Instead of helping me, she have shouted and put down the phone on me. The receptionist at the hotel was helpful.

reviews.title: No more next time
reviews.text: I was very disappointed with the hotel service as not up to the 5-Stars standard. The staffs handled every single request were very bad.
reviews.room_type: King Accessible Guest Room W/roll In Shower

reviews.title: Service standard has dropped..
reviews.text: 2nd time staying here but this time round the room was smaller, they run out of additional bed (though it was requested upon booking). Booked a room for 3pax but there were only 2 sets of toiletries. Had to call Care Line for towels. And they came 3 times to send the towels. Staff are not very friendly. Very different from my first stay here. Good spread of food for breakfast buffet. Convenient location to Komtar, City Square & CIQ.

reviews.title: value for money
reviews.text: room is clean and spacious but staff at front desk is not helpful and unfriendly. should have to improve

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: There are stains in your sink. Yuks!!

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Staff are helpful on early check in and while waiting for room, we used the Swimming pool and the shower area was fully equipped.  Room was nice and clean with nice view. Walking distance to nearest shopping need 10 mins under hot sun.  Not advisable to walk in the night as some area can be dark and dangerous.  No nearby eateries.  Overall is a good hotel for staycation and drive out to shopping area.

reviews.title: No Comments
reviews.text: No Comments

reviews.title: Just checked into the hotel and extremely disappoi
Not as super as I thought
reviews.text: Stayed 3D/2N with my family and parents. Took 2 rooms (one bedroom suite & deluxe). Recep was sweet enough to give rooms side by side & she was friendly. Rooms were clean and expected for a 4 star hotel. As it was raining, we had to order room service however the food was so so. Could have been better. As I'm travelling with my parents, the distance to city square mall was a distance. We couldnt even get cabs. Construction near the hotel was on going making it more difficult for us to cross over as there was no traffic light and it was a busy road. We had to wait for a passenger to drop off only then we can get a cab. However the bell boys were of great help to assist as much as they can and I appreciate that. Breakfast was just average. Checking out was most a disappointment. The Recep that attended to me was just rude, unfriendly and unprofessional. As I booked through Agoda,  no payment was needed however I wanted a receipt to ensure I'm charged accordingly and as a reference. She bluntly told me," U booked through Agoda right? So no receipt will be given to u".She ended her sentence and just cut me off. I only enquired as I wanted to know if I'm charged for an extra bed as I requested when doing the booking however did not receive it. Her attitude was just plain rude. I also overheard her conversation with a colleague that she needed to head to the ladies. Indeed unacceptable to speak in between when you are serving a guest. I believe the hotel needs to ensure Recep are properly trained and to be professional as that reflects the image of the hotel.
reviews.positives: Clean, bell boys & room service staffs were friendly.

reviews.title: review of hilton
reviews.text: As a whole its staff performance is gd.however the standards in its Tosca and Makan kitchen have dropped.

reviews.title: Not worth Hilton
reviews.text: Not worth my 120$ . Breakfast is not included. And the room is too small .
reviews.positives: The location is good. Staff is friendly. Lobby is nice.

reviews.title: A Hilton that doesn't feel like Hilton
reviews.text:
We got ourself a suite, which we prefer to be downgraded because the suite is really small and unsuitable for baby. The suite has a lot of wasted spaces, the bedroom is very small, the living rooom is just as small.

We have access to the executive lounge, and it was packed and stuffy with lots of small children running around. The carpets were dirty, the some of the food were empty and took a long time to refill. The juices tasted like concentrates.

We ordered room service, the Johor laksa and Nasi lemak was so bad, we had to order caesar salad and a char kway tiaw.

Overall, I think this property should not belong under the Hilton brand.
reviews.positives: The parking lot is superbly maintained, the Lego dragon, breakfast.

reviews.title: No free wifi
reviews.text: I felt disappointed because the counter. Said that the room I have choose is not includede free wifi, by the way, I ever been china, and free wifi was served by the hotel . It is very important , because everyone using wifi nowadays.is wifi very expensive?

reviews.title: stingy hotel
reviews.text: Inexperience receptionist. I am doing business in johor bahru and traveling around places and staying many hotels this is the only hotel which i have to pay for internet access after paying 5 star room rates . There are many hotel giving free internet access with lower room rate. Its very inconvenience to me which i have to carry my notebook to lobby to finish my work.

reviews.title: My bed had bed bugs.
reviews.text: My bed had bed bugs and i had to sleep on a bath towel. it caused lots of itch while i was trying to sleep.

reviews.title: Full of disappointment
reviews.text:
Totally a bad experience. Aircon spoil, perpetually cold, cannot adjust. The reception service was really bad upon checking in. Gave a small room when we book extra bed. Barely able to walk. When asked for a bigger room, said thats the room size for triple sharing.

After reporting to them about the aircon issue, maintenance came to service a few time, told us cannot repair.. we can request to change room. It was then they gave us a bigger room..

Breakfast was a total disappointment too. 

Lousy experience. Will not return again.
reviews.response:
Dear Judy,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback.

We sincerely apologise for the disappointing experience you had and truly regret that several aspects of your stay did not meet expectations. This is certainly not the impression we wish to leave with our guests.

Our team has reached out to you personally to follow up on your concerns and address the matter directly. We appreciate you bringing this to our attention.

reviews.title: Chargeable Amenities
reviews.text: Utensils are chargeable even though last time they would bring it up for free. This change is unpleasant
reviews.room_type: King Executive Room W/ Lounge Access

reviews.title: Cockroach found..
reviews.text: Huge cockroach found in room. Hotel offered a change of room with complimentary breakfast as service recovery. But small cockroach was still found in new room. Seems pest control is an issue in the hotel.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Many road works within the area
reviews.room_type: Twin Executive Room W/ Lounge Access

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Be careful @washroom. Wet floor u May just slipped and got hurt like me

reviews.title: Cleanliness
reviews.text: We had thought the standards for cleanliness would be better at Hilton so we were disappointed to see the poor maintenance. It was telling when the windows and glasses are stained. But otherwise, housekeeping staff are prompt and responsive.

reviews.title: Double tree need to improve on food taste and quality
reviews.text: Double tree need to improve on food taste and quality, the standard dropped tremendously compared to 2023. not sure what happened in the kitchen.?  the rest are still standard.

reviews.title: Not worth it for the price
reviews.text: Aircon was really hot. Found it hard to sleep. They definitely need to fix that. Service was fine and amenities were ok but if you would like to sleep in a sauna, this is the best place to be. We turned the aircon to 16° and it was on full blast but the room never turn cold, all in the spirit of saving the environment. Won’t book this again

reviews.title: Charging for cutleries
reviews.text: Rm5 for spare cutleries?RIDICULOUS

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text:
Been staying here for multiple times but this trip has got to be one of the worst. Our neighbours were noisy and there was constant slamming of doors very early in the morning and also as it is near the utility room, that made it noisy too. 
The lift lobby that I was on stank of poo from the day I checked in to the next day when I checked out. 

Its usually my go to hotel for a short holiday with my family but maybe its time to look for other hotels

reviews.title: Lost a electric toothbrush!
reviews.text: During my stay, I accidentally left behind my electric toothbrush in the toilet and cup. Despite contacting the hotel after departure, the hotel staff failed to locate it. Losing personal belongings is distressing, especially when staying at a reputable property. I do wish to question the integrity and honesty of the cleaner on the duty that day. Stayed in room 1621 from 22-Jun to 24-Jun 2024. Please be mindful of your things for those who wish to stay in this hotel, it has been an unpleasant and regret staying in this hotel.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Poor value for money

reviews.title: 1 night stay
reviews.text: Check in was smooth, security was great. However, getting to the car park may be tricky. We were disappointed with the cleanliness of the bedding though. The pillow cases didn’t smell fresh and clean at all, we could smell someone else’s hair/ head scent the moment we lay down. Hope the housekeeping looks into it.

reviews.title: Not a place I use to stay
reviews.text: This is after covid travel, so many years had I stayed. Now, it is no longer the same. I had a family executive room. The room is spacious. Amenities are bare minimum which I can understand, going green after all. However, there are damages and also, king bedded room came without door lock. Damages to the wall by previous hotel guests are also no rectified in the other room. As this is executive room, my previous experience during check-in was done in the lounge, but not the case this time. The lounge only provides food during pre-dinner reception. No snack and limited beverages like soft drink. No longer provided bottle water for out taking. Food is quite limited. It is also pack, advice to go an hour before or reserve if you really want to have a place to sit. Lounge staff is friendly. Help a lot with cocktail.  The package came with Buffet Seafood Dinner at Makan Kitchen. I don't think it is worth if it is not part of the package. Not a lot of fresh item, especially, I can see the obvious action taken by the staff to limit the Sashimi Salmon. Durian Goreng is good, but again, limited. I don't think it ran out due to popular demand. I saw that it was kept at the table behind the display. Common tim sum like prawn dumpling ran out early in the evening. Breakfast buffet is equally not impressive. Same behaviour by the staff, not to prepare sufficiently. I don't recommend to take up the buffet dinner/breakfast but only to stay with executive lounge would be sufficient.
reviews.room_type: 2 Bedroom Deluxe Family Suite W/Lounge Access

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: front office staff unhelpful and unfriendly. the room door terrible when close whole door frame shaking and very loud noise, air-condition not work properly very warm.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Nice hotel. Good facilities. Friendly staff

reviews.title: Weekend getaway
reviews.text: room expensive yet very small. location far from mall. uneven Road outside and very steep. not suitable for prams or kids.

reviews.title: Safety issue
reviews.text: Room door was left open by housekeeping for many hours  yet room was not clean.

reviews.title: Ok location but rooms are getting old and tired
reviews.text: Good service, love the warm cookies at check in, love the breakfast buffet, just wish the rooms were more luxe

reviews.title: Not satisfied.
reviews.text: Being a Hilton honors member, doesn’t give you any benefit by booking through agoda and you will be not treated well because you have used a third party booking instead of booking directly. I literally felt the difference  from the valet parking service up to even from the bath  towel that was provided in room. Definitely using the Hilton direct booking going forward.

reviews.title: I thought Doubletree set the benchmark
reviews.text:
Waited check-in for more than 20 mins, no urgency to serve.
All plugs near table are not functioning. Luckily there’s one under table which table lamp connected.
All TV channels are not available. Luckily I’m not here for leisure purpose.
Towel is worn out. Bathrobe not provided. Toiletries rather insufficient, no razor etc.
Asked for help to borrow a laptop mouse during midnight, a worn sticky chipping mouse provided. Returned it at morning and did mention room number again. During check out, almost need to triple confirm that it was returned, security level is high.
High points are food is nice and water supply is warm. That’s all.

reviews.title: The room is comfortable except the location is not convenient at all
reviews.text: Room service, bed is comfy except it is not located in the centre of city. Not convenient for shopping.

reviews.title: The cot was stained, hotel needs a revamp, looks dated
reviews.text: The hotel looks dated already. I have always been a fan of doubletree JB but there are other newer hotels that can do better than them. The price is on the high side yet the toilets look old and the rooms look tired. It desperately needs a makeover. The cot that we received was also stained and we felt disgusted to let the little one sleep in there. The breakfast is awesome as usual.

reviews.title: Facilities to be improved
reviews.text: Water heater is inconsistent. Hot and Cold at times

reviews.title: great room interior
reviews.text: nice bed and nice design ...

reviews.title: Slightly disappointed by the service and thin walls
reviews.text: When i first checked in, the bedsheets had some stains on it. When i asked the staff to replace the bedsheets, they were apologetic about it and had it immediately replaced. After an uncomfortable 1st night, i realised that the air con was very cold as it could not go higher than 19 degrees.  On the 2nd day before i went out, i called the careline and told them about this problem and asked them to fix the air con when i was out. When i was back at night around 845pm, i noticed that the problem was not gone at all. When i called the careline, they told me that their staff has come already and found nothing wrong with it, i asked for the staff to come check again. When the staff came at 9pm, he told me that there was something wrong with the motor and therefore tts why the controller could not change the temperature. He told me he had requested for the duty manager to replace the room for me but they could not because they had high occupancy rate.  They took 30 mins to fix it as i waited

reviews.title: Zero customer service
reviews.text: The venue is beautiful and clean, but that is about all this place has to offer. The walls are paper thin. We couldn't hear our TV over the guy in the next room snoring. When we rang the front desk to see if anything could be done they said they would check and get back to us....I'm still waiting! After another sleepless night what was meant to be the perfect ending to my vacation left me feeling disappointed. They could have at least called back to say they tried but couldn't find a solution. You cant complain about the service - there wasn't ANY!

reviews.title: Not Worth It
reviews.text:
-Not worth paying a RM530 live in a normal room (nothing impress).
-Water temperature of hotel room was unstable. It was going from hot to cold and hot again, again & again.
-No free parking for hotel guests.

reviews.title: Paying high dollar for a room,  but need to pay for wifi. Even a 3 star hotel i stayed in Indonesia
reviews.text: Breakfast n lunch buffet is nothing impressive

reviews.title: Average Range Hotel
reviews.text:
Overall the hotel are ok, the lobby quite nice and grand, but the room itself quite disappointed me. I'm paying SGD160 for King Deluxe Room, ya we got a king size bed, other then that the room nothing make me impress.
Just a normal room. The design of the room also very normal for a 5 Star Hotel. Probably I have very high expectation when I make the booking, that's why I get disappointed when I check in. You may go ahead with your booking If you do not have high expectation like me.

reviews.title: Hit and miss
reviews.text: Good location near shopping centres, station and eateries.  Excellent seafood buffet dinner.  Hardware and services weren't consistently good.  For a supposedly five-star hotel chain, I was expecting better.  Some staff could have been more thorough (missed the basics).  Internet not reliable.

reviews.title: Doubletree Hilton JB really good?
reviews.text:
When making up room, chamber maids often forget to replace bath towels, floor cloth, FACS and hand towels. They even took away the shower robes! Water were also not replaced. This hotel is so different from other 4 star hotels we stayed in. The chamber maids would fold our clothes neatly and place them on the bed or chairs, instead of dumping them unceremoniously on the chairs. The toilets also lacked ventulator, thus smell lingered from previous guests! :(
The pool side restaurant was also most unusual in that they refuse to let pool guest use their alfresco dining areas for meals. They insisted all guests must be dry! (at a pool side restaurant! And they have water proof chairs!) what is interesting was also the pool changing rooms. There was no water supply to wash basins nor toilets! Only bathing facilities have water!
reviews.positives: Rooms were big enough, good tv channels for kids, swim pool is good

reviews.title: No proper system
reviews.text: As much as I understand that it is a festive period, the hotel should anticipate and put in more manpower in manning the counters for check-in. Instead there is only 3 counters operating with 1 manned by the manager himself and 2 concierge staffs who have nothing much to do except pacing up and down the counters. This resulted in the check-in queue to form a ‘snake’ line. As much as the counter staff wants to facilitate and goes the ‘extra mile’ service to the tourist’s queries, all irrelevant queries (eg. places to go, are the vicinity of the hotel, etc), these queries should be directed to the concierge to address not the counter staffs that caused longer waiting time for other tourists to check in. And I don’t understand the hotel policy of the need to make a deposit when there is nt even a mini bar in the room. To ease the flow of traffic and convenience, the hotel should just include the deposit amount in the total price of stay or just remove the deposit like some other hotels (eg. St Giles). And you can’t have the same queue as the check in tourist just to get back your deposit money! It just makes the queue longer and longer! You got to have 2 separate counters for check-in and check out. Probably not for normal days but esp need so during the festive period. In all honesty, was quite disappointed with the hotel given that it is by Hilton, our expectation were not met and the hotel did not live up to its reputation.

Our hands were full and no one came to help open their big glass door

3. The complimentary shuttle driver came late at 2.40 pm instead of 2pm. I don't think there were passenger going to Premium outlet on that day and no reason for the driver to come so late. Poor time management.

The good thing about the hotel is their facilities and service at the check in counter. We love the Hilton cookies and bought 2 tins on Friday. We were also pleased that they upgraded their dinner buffet menu on Friday 20 Sep 2024.

reviews.title: Short stay at DoubleTree
reviews.text: Stayed with my family of 4 here for  2 days 1 night. I arrived at 1.30pm.  I have stayed twice in JB before and both hotels (different hotels) allowed early check in which was very helpful cos I have kids and bags and I prefer to leave them inside the room and then head out to spend the day. But for this hotel,  I was told room wasn't ready or available yet and told a few times that check in is only at 3pm. We were at the lounge for more than an hour. My kids were getting restless and time was wasted by waiting when we could have gone out to do our activities and shopping etc. Finally we got the room and checked in. The room view faced the pool which was rather empty. The view was blocked by many buildings. For me that is okay. Cos I don't usually stay in the room as I spend the day outside and then come back to hotel to shower/ sleep. I tried to watch the TV at night. I noticed some Singapore TV channels the connection kept going off and coming back. I didn't experience this with other hotels. The pillows were flat and I had neck pain in the morning. The only good thing was we had two queen beds which was great for my family of 4. The other hotels I stayed at had only two single beds and we usually squeeze and sleep. But this queen beds are in the executive rooms. Another huge drawback in this hotel.. the shower room... The shower has a glass panel. Whoever is showering, the person in the room, can see them. That is the most uncomfortable thing I had to endure. I even asked the hotel if there is a curtain to pull down to cover the panel. I was told no. First time I had to experience this level of discomfort for a shower room. For this reason I may not come back to the hotel. Sorry.

reviews.text: We were there for a 2 night stay. During the check-in, we casually asked if we could have a complementary upgrade to a room with a bath tub as our boy enjoys water play in the bath. It was alright when we were declined and asked to pay RM300 for the upgrade. The staff said that an upgrade is given to higher grade Hilton Honors member which was different from our experience at DoubleTree Hilton Malacca. Prior to us joining as member, the manager upgraded us without question. Thereafter, the staff gave us a room right at the end of the corridor nearest to where constructions of next buildings were. We were not given the welcome cookies which is a signature gesture of the hotel chain. No one came to help us with our luggage and stroller.  We could hear construction sound during the day and night. He is fully aware that we have a young child. After our wonderful experience at DoubleTree Hilton Malacca, this stay at Doubletree Hilton JB was a disappointment. We would hesitate to return.

- hotel staff are warm and friendly.

Cons:

So I asked if I can redeem immediately but the counter staff told me it wasn't ready and asked me to come again in the afternoon. I went to ask again around 6pm, and was told it was still not yet ready, and asked me to come again. After I came back from dinner around 9pm, I went to ask and again, I was told it wasn't ready. The staff did not provide me any explanation and I have to ask will it ever be ready today, then only the staff replied me "There are many customers today and they don't have enough stocks, and I can come tomorrow."!!! 
Why don't the staff just told me all are given out and ask me to come the next day instead?

reviews.text:
Overall my stay here was fine until my experience with the staff by the pool.  I was looking forward to chill by the pool. I went down at about 2pm in the afternoon. I wanted to order some drinks but there was no staffs in sight so I went into the restaurant by the pool to order the drinks. An Indian male staff was on the phone by the counter when I requested to order the drink. 
I went ahead and ordered two drinks and went back to chill by the pool. I waited for more than 20 mins and the drinks was still not serve ( I was the ONLY person at the pool) After 30 mins, just as I wanted to cancel my order, that staff appear. What made it worse was shortly after he left. The strong winds by the pool blew the glasses to the ground. I barely had a sip! I went in again to tell him what happened. reviews.title: Not a 5 star hotel.
reviews.text:
I am quite surprise on how this hotel got so many positive review. It is a good hotel but to call it 5 star is overkill. At highest I can only give it 3 star. The only reason they call themselves 5 star are because it got Hilton name in it.

Car park (2 star)-

The car park are small. It is guarded by a guy who can't even speak Malay or English but generous in smile making communication really hard. And for a 5 star hotel, I am surprise the car park are not free. You need to pay RM 10 per night. BTW, don't use touch n go. They will charge you per hour rate. I pay a high sum of money to you and you can't even let go of the RM 10 park money. Really a dirty way to rip off our money.

Check in (2 star)-

The check-in is damn slow. I mean super slow for a "5" star hotel. It took us 20 minutes to check in and we are second in row. I also saw a couple foreigner going angry because they were in the hilton honors line but they have to take the same time as us to be treated. So what the purpose of being in your fancy hilton honor club if it is the same. But the good news is you got a warm cookies. Their signature trademark. The cookies are good. I mean really good. That is the only good thing about the hotel. 

They also promote us to enter the hilton honor club for free. They said the next time I want to book the hotel, I just need to call them directly, no need to use Agoda. You know why I book using Agoda, because I try calling them at the first place and they put me on-hold for almost 10 minute. Then they pick up just to put on another hold. It end up in a failure. I fed up and just book using Agoda. "5" star indeed.

Internet-
No wifi connection unless you are in the hilton honor club. Thats right, although you pay hefty sum of money for the night, you won't get any wifi connection. If you want, you need to pay for it. 

Services (4 star)-

Well I can't deny it, they smile all the time and try so hard to greet you. You can feel how fake it is. But thats

reviews.title: A 5 star said hotel that requires its guests to pay for parking
reviews.text:
I'm an annual visitor of DoubleTree Johor Bahru since 2 years ago. Each and every single time the registration is always late. 

This time I decided try out their suite. By the look of the room, the size, decor and amenities are good. However, surprisingly the mini bar is empty! No snacks no drinks. Only sachets of tea, coffee and sugar.

The iron was broken, the bathroom door was stuck. Newspapers are only offered when requested. Not quite a 5 star treatment expected for a suite guest. 

The worst part of all is having to pay for parking every single day I leave the hotel. Never have I come across a 5 star hotel that requires its guest to pay for the parking. RM10 per day okay. Not sure if it is per entrance though. Wasn't charged in 2014 or 2015.  Anyways, future guests please be prepared. 

Overall, DoubleTree has either gone from bad to worse or hasn't improved much. I chose this hotel because of its reputation worldwide and also location. Hope they will improve.

reviews.title: One night in Johor
reviews.text:
We arrived at 3.30pm and we were told that our room choice (king sized bed, non smoking floor) was unavailable. Instead we were offered a twin room on a smoking floor. I told the receptionist that it was everything I did NOT ask for. He then told me I would have to wait but could not tell me how long I'd have to wait for. He then offered me a twin bed on a non smoking floor, which I accepted as I had a function to attend that very evening and did not want to hang around waiting for an indefinite period. Guests usually form their first impression of any hotel from the point of check-in and as you can tell, mine was not a positive start. 

However, when we told the hotel manager this upon check out, he was most apologetic and offered to upgrade us the next time we stay with them.

reviews.title: Average business hotel
reviews.text: I stayed 1 night in a Kind Deluxe. Was a small room, very average (stains in carpet, old watercooker) but fine for my purpose, just needed a clean bed, a desk and a shower.  Was completely taken off guard to find out I had to pay for Wifi, which I think is completely outdated. The client manager gave me "complimentarty" access and did a good job in settling me in. Bed was fine, but very early in the morning I wanted to take a shower only to find out the water went from boiling to icecold in seconds and back. I burnt my skin and was very happy my kid was not in that shower. When I went downstairs to check out and reported this, there was no apologies, no offer (to shower somewhere else maybe?) and when I told them this was a real problem they thanked me for my feedback. Not such a good experience....

reviews.title: comfortable room, breakfast horrible
reviews.text: Hotel was generally fine. But the breakfast was horribly dirty. The selection of the food was fine. However I came in with me 2 kids waiting for a table and this guy brought us to a dirty table. Ofcourse I expected that they would clean it. But they ended up cleaning it with a used tissue. Absolutely disgusting. When I asked do you think this is clean the guy looked at me confused and said yes.... Happend 2 days in a row... Breakfast not recommended!

reviews.title: Feedback

Staff do not communicate with each other. When I was checking-in the night before, already requested for check-out extension until 12 noon. However, at 9.30 am the next day there was a knock on the door asking me to check-out. Told the staff we had requested for an extension . At 10+ there was a knock again , this time asking to check the bar fridge and we haven't even check-out yet. 

Suggestion for staff to
Improve on their internal communication to avoid inconvenient to the customers.

reviews.title: Housekeeping need to improve
reviews.text:
First day when we arrive at hotel around 2pm, there is room for us to check in early. so we wait for our turn to call. We manage to check in around 3.20pm which check in time is 3pm.

When we first step in to room, the room was not clean, the towel is flying here and there, we call up to complain and waited 15mins to change the room. i decide to have my earlier room due to the view. So we told them to clean the room first and we will go for our late lunch at 4pm. 

When we come back to hotel around 7pm, they have gave us a tin of cookies and some fruits to apologize the incidents. But when I in the room, they haven't deliver our luggage. We has call up 3 times and i also go down counter to check, they say will deliver soon, we waited about an hour, and lastly a girl call me say if we have any problem, we told the girl we haven't receive our luggage and we cannot shower and we have a little baby need to shower. She quickly call the relevant department and a guy call me back, and ask how our luggage look like. Haix, this is my holiday but they really spoil my mood.
But most of the staff are friendly and helpful, I will like to give my star to the counter that close to glass, for (transportation??) I forget the name of the counter, they are helpful.

reviews.title: Late Check In
reviews.text:
We booked a 2-bedroom suite with access to the executive lounge and requested an early check-in at 1 PM. However, due to various reasons, the hotel couldn’t accommodate our request, which is understandable as it depends on availability.
What was unacceptable, though, was that our official check-in time was 3 PM, yet we didn’t receive our room until 3:30 PM. The worst part was that I had arranged a birthday package to decorate the room as a surprise for my daughter. When we finally entered the room, the staff was still inside, tidying up and decorating. They only left at 3:40 PM.
I wouldn’t have minded if this was a complimentary service, but I paid an extra 230 RM for it. The hotel did offer a 50 RM voucher, but that hardly made up for the inconvenience. I’m sharing this because I believe the hotel needs to improve its service—ruining a surprise for a loved one is disappointing.
This isn’t an isolated incident either, as I’ve seen other reviews mentioning delayed check-ins. The hotel is strict about charging for early check-in and late check-out, so they should be just as diligent in ensuring rooms are ready on time. I understand that it’s the school holiday season, but that’s no excuse for lowering service standards. If the hotel can’t handle the demand, they shouldn’t accept more bookings than they can manage.

reviews.title: Bad experience
reviews.text:
Had a terrible experience at this hotel. Despite staying at this hotel many times through the years and several times this year only, it took the receptionist nearly half an hour to do my check in despite me arriving nearly 9pm. The person doing my check in was totally inept and inexperienced. I told him that I was experiencing gastric pains and that dinner was already included in my booking, he had to go in and out of the back office to keep checking instead of letting me go have my dinner first or even quickly doing my check in. He seemed more concerned about checking whether I’m entitled to what I claim I’m entitled to. I just don’t understand, does he feel that I won’t have money to pay even if ultimately he checked and things I claim I’m entitled to, are not?
I’m willing to give Doubletree another chance but it will certainly take a lot to make me come back to stay.

reviews.title: Poor Attitude of Check in Staff and Snatch Thief Case
reviews.text:
We checked in 24th June 2017 for two rooms, one with my daughters, room 2304 and another, my other daughter and her friend at room 1415. The check in staff's (Chinese girl) attitude was poor - told us room will be ready at 4pm when we checked in at 3pm (the actual time) and gave us a complimentary $100 voucher to use while the rooms are being readied. I was so tired and not in the mood to wait!!! And she told me, no free wifi because I didn't book directly with Hilton website but through third party!!!!!!

No one told me this. If that is true, next time all of us just book direct with Hilton!

The 23rd floor is HH floor, but it smelt of cigarette and the room had strong cigarette odour. I informed Tammie, upon my check out on 25th June and she was very apologetic about it. Kuddos to Tammie who helped to soften the frustrations I had with the check in totally unpleasant girl.

Yesterday, my daughter and her friend at room 1415 shared with us the snatch thief near to AMMA restaurant on the motorbike. The rider snatched their shopping bags and rode off. It was a good thing only the shopping bags and nothing else, although the bag contained branded goods. They walked back from City Square shopping centre to Hilton =(. The street lamps should be enhanced and the area seemed quite and deserted in the night. Hotel should caution guests not to walk back from the City Square/Komtar shopping centre. The incident happened about late 8pm.

Having shared the above, I like also to say thanks to the great service staff at the Italian restaurant =)

reviews.title: Not worth the price
reviews.text: Rooms come with a hefty price tag for a JB Hotel. Though the hotel positions itself under the Hilton brand, one would expect it to have the basic amenities in this new age world. However, WIFI access is only restricted to Hilton members who make their bookings direct through its website. Hence, Hilton members who book through other third party platform sites are disregarded as their members. Breakfast is also not included though its price is steeper. One would expect better service for the price paid. Upon submitting an email feedback to its hotel, I received a reply which did nothing to address my concerns and the feel I gather is that the hotel and its staff are very complacent because of its 'Hilton' positioning. Disappointing.

reviews.title: Good hardware, software needs work
reviews.text: The place is new which means clean facilities. The breakfast spread was also good with freshly pressed juices, good selection. So all is good but the staff and perhaps processes needs to be worked out. There were several occasions where the staff could have done better especially in an establishment such as Hilton. We came with 2 other families and on various occasions, the staff did not handle our situation well enough. The card access had to be reprogrammed daily and having done that, the front desk should have checked that we have additional lounge access. This has caused us to make repeat trips which is very inconvenient for a family with small ones. To have our parking ticket validated, the queue is the same as for regular check in/out. Imagine having to wait for a check out which can take time when all I wanted was to have my ticket validated. We had an incident where the manager, on asking whether there are anymore half boiled eggs, just took the tag away and told us there weren't any, as though what we saw earlier was a fantasy! Absolutely puzzling behaviour. Hence my title... good hardware as in the rooms and facilities but software needs work (people, processes).

reviews.title: Unexpected Unpleasant Experienced at Hilton
reviews.text:
My eldest sister was disgnosed with gastroenteritis after taking the breakfast at Makan Kitchen of Doubletree Hilton Hotel, JB. She vomited twice and had diarrhoea after the breakfast. 

I made a call to the operator at around 10:15am this morning and requested for the manager- on-duty to come to the room, to witness her condition and to report this matter to the hotel. However, no one came. My sister's fiancee went down to the front desk to speak to the front desk manager and the manger replied that no one had informed him.

The manager told my sister's fiancee that the symptoms of food poisoning will only take effect 4 to 5 hours after the meals. If my sister had food poisoned this morning, it should come from the food she took yesterday. However, the manager didn't know that we had dinner buffet at their same restaurant Makan Kitchen last evening.

The manager offered to send my sister to a nearby clinic and said that he would need the doctor's report to help us to claim the medical expense "but" there is no guarantee we can get it.

There was no empathy as the manager's respond was cold and indifferent.

Upon hearing the feedback from my sister's fiancee when he returned back to the room alone, I wrote in to the Customer Service team immediately via whatsapp and the Director, Operations responded. He instructed the same front desk manager to come to the room to meet up with us. 

Subsequently, we agreed for the hotel to arrange the transport to send my sister to the clinic and the doctor confirmed the diagnosis and suggested that my sister to rest till 6pm. 

We had to forego our returned train back Singapore and make our own private arrangement to return back.
